# Project Understanding
<!-- Generated by /dso:onboarding — human-readable and editable. Last updated: 2026-05-18 -->

## Stack
- Language/runtime: Bicep (Azure ARM DSL) (user-stated)
- Framework: N/A — Infrastructure as Code (user-stated)
- Package manager: N/A — Bicep modules referenced locally (user-stated)
- Runtime versions: latest `bicep` CLI / `az bicep` (user-stated)

## Architecture
- Structure: single deployable Bicep template at Azure subscription scope (user-stated)
- Module layout: `modules/` contains per-resource Bicep modules; `params/` contains one parameter file per environment (user-stated)
- Key design patterns: subscription-scope deployment with resource-module decomposition (user-stated)
- Entry point: `main.bicep` (user-stated)

## Design Summary
- UI layer: backend-only — no UI (user-stated)
- UI framework: N/A
- Design system: N/A
- Accessibility targets: not applicable

## Commands
- Test: N/A — no application test suite (user-stated)
- Lint: `bicep build` (compile + warnings as the de facto lint) (user-stated)
- Format: N/A — relying on Bicep CLI default formatting (user-stated)
- Dev server: N/A
- Build: `bicep build main.bicep` (user-stated)
- Validate: `az deployment sub validate --location <region> --template-file main.bicep --parameters params/<env>.bicepparam` (user-stated)
- Deploy: `az deployment sub create --location <region> --template-file main.bicep --parameters params/<env>.bicepparam` (user-stated)

## Infrastructure
- Hosting: Azure, subscription-scope deployments (user-stated)
- Databases: defined within deployed Bicep modules (not part of this repo's tooling) (user-stated)
- External services: none managed by this repo outside Azure (user-stated)
- Secrets management: pipeline-stored secrets (Azure DevOps variable groups) + Key Vault references in Bicep (user-stated)
- Identity model: managed identity in CI pipeline; interactive `az login` for local runs (user-stated)

## CI
- Provider: Azure DevOps Pipelines (user-stated)
- Pipeline stages: defined outside this repository (user-stated)
- Test gates: none in-repo today (user-stated)
- Deployment triggers: manual only (user-stated)
- Note: no `.github/workflows/` will be created — CI is intentionally handled outside this repo for now

## Enforcement
- Pre-commit hooks: none currently (detected); DSO baseline test + review gates will be installed by onboarding
- Linting tools: none in use today (user-stated — repo is immature testing-wise)
- Commit message convention: none (user-stated)
- Review requirements: none (user-stated)
- Test coverage policy: none (user-stated)

## Additional Notes
Project-specific quirks, naming conventions, and operational context live in `readme.md` and elsewhere in the repository (user-stated). Onboarding artifacts intentionally defer to the repo's own documentation for details beyond the seven onboarding dimensions.
